zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin II de Clermont於大約0990年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特時，他的父親Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis27歲，母親Adèle de Francie23歲。他於1008年與Havoise de Nesle在法國布格尼艾福內維斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1042年9月10日在法國布格尼艾福內維斯享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudouin II de Clermont于大约0990年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特时，他的父亲Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis27岁，母亲Adèle de Francie23岁。他于1008年与Havoise de Nesle在法国布格尼艾福內維斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1042年9月10日在法国布格尼艾福內維斯享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clermont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin II de Clermont was born about 0990, in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis, was 27 and his mother, Adèle de Francie, was 23. He married Havoise de Nesle in 1008, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 10 September 1042, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin II de Clermont est né environ 0990, à Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Adèle de Francie, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Havoise de Nesle en 1008, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 10 septembre 1042, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin II de Clermont um 0990 in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis 27 und seine Mutter Adèle de Francie 23. Er hat 1008 in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich Havoise de Nesle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 10. September 1042 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin II de Clermont è nato il circa 0990 nel Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Adèle de Francie, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Havoise de Nesle nel 1008, nel Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 10 settembre 1042, nel Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin II de Clermontが約0990年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼクラーモントで生まれた時，父Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisisは27歳，母Adèle de Francieは23歳であった。1008年にフランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズでHavoise de Nesleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1042年9月10日にフランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin II de Clermont(이)가 대략 0990년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Adèle de Francie(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1008년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 Havoise de Nesle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1042년 9월 10일 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin II de Clermont nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de Francie, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Havoise de Nesle em 1008, em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1042, em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin II de Clermont родился около 0990 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Adèle de Francie, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Havoise de Nesle в 1008 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 10 сентября 1042 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin II de Clermont nació aproximadamente 0990, en Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Baudouin I de Clermont-en-Beauvaisis, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Adèle de Francie, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Havoise de Nesle en 1008, en Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1042, en Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
